body.p: Test whether the topic can be finalized automatically by the system.

fig.title: Home page of the Project module

body.p: The following table describes the function modules in each area on this page:

entry.p: Displays submodules of the [Project] module, such asProject ManagementandProject Info.

p.uicontrol: This Quick Operation Guide is intended to guide the rapid use of DNBSEQ-T7+RS and the sequencing reagent kit.

entry.p: Displays the storage information of the projects.

li.p: Displays the storage information of the projects. SelectCumulativein the upper-right corner of the area to view the cumulative storage distribution of the projects.
SelectRealTimeto view the real-time storage distribution of the projects.

entry.p: Displays the project distribution information by process (also referred to as pipeline). After you select a project in the leftThis Quick Operation Guide is intended to guide the rapid use of DNBSEQ-T7+RS and the sequencing reagent kit.pie chart, the system will screen and display the corresponding process data of the selected project in this area.
